description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a neatly manicured lawn and several trees. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows along the main facades, allowing for ample natural light and clear views into the open-plan living and dining areas. The exterior walls are primarily white with accents of dark brown, likely wood or composite panels, adding warmth and contrast to the minimalist design. The house includes multiple entry points, with a prominent main entrance sheltered by an overhang and a patio area furnished for outdoor seating. The layout is open and spacious, with visible interior partitions separating private rooms from communal spaces. Landscaping elements, such as shrubs and paved walkways, enhance the curb appeal and provide a welcoming approach.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a white exterior accented by dark brown panels, set within a landscaped lawn with trees and patios.
description_view_0: This view highlights the long facade with extensive floor-to-ceiling windows, a covered patio, and landscaped garden beds along the front.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side of the house is visible, showing the main entrance, additional windows, and a clear view of the backyard lawn and trees.
description_view_2: This perspective displays the rear facade, featuring more windows, a secondary entrance, and a continuation of the flat roof and white exterior.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the opposite side of the house, revealing the patio area, side entry, and a mix of private and communal spaces inside.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide glass door, and adjacent patio area, accented by clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
